The latest is star striker Kylian Mbappe, who is a late doubt for the game. arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Al Hilal: Xabi Alonso Awards Two Debuts
arts.sum: While the Argentine teenager will represent River Plate at the FIFA Club World Cup, Alexander-Arnold and Huijsen are set to make their debuts for Real Madrid in the newly expanded tournament. The biggest club in the world had a busy summer after finishing the 2024–25 season without a major trophy ; Los Blancos replaced Carlo Ancelotti with Alonso and then signed Trent Alexander-Arnold, Dean Huijsen and Franco Mastantuono.

arts.ttl: ’I Wouldn’t Be Surprised’-Al Hilal CEO Makes Bold Vinicius Junior Transfer Prediction
arts.sum: Al Hilal CEO Esteve Calzada believes that the Saudi Pro League is capable of attracting any player, including Real Madrid superstar Vinícius Júnior, but has denied holding direct talks with the Brazilian. Despite this, Calzada, who previously worked in a management role for the City Football Group, believes that one day, Vinícius could wind up in the Saudi Pro League.

arts.ttl: Al-Hilal CEO confirms Saudi Arabia talks with Real Madrid star Vinicius Junior
arts.sum: Al-Hilal CEO Esteve Calzada has confirmed that Saudi Arabia have held talks with Vinicius Junior over a move to the Middle East. The Real Madrid superstar is widely expected to sign a contract extension with Los Blancos this summer.
